title: Create a new account and land on the dashboard
description: Verifies a visitor can register with valid details and is redirected into the authenticated dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill New User 1 into the name field
Fill new.user.1@example.test into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Fill the same password into the confirm password field
Submit the registration form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Create a post from the dashboard feed
description: An authenticated member can create a new post from the dashboard and the post appears in the feed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Fill a unique post message into the post body field
Submit the new post
Verify the newly created post is displayed in the feed

title: Log in successfully and land on the dashboard
description: Verifies an existing user can log in with valid credentials and reach the authenticated dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Log out from the dashboard
description: An authenticated member can log out and is returned to the public home page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Initiate logout from the main navigation
Verify the user lands on the public home page

title: View paginated posts on the dashboard
description: An authenticated member can view the dashboard feed and navigate pagination to see more posts.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Scroll to the pagination controls at the bottom of the feed
Click the control to go to the next page of posts
Verify a list of posts is displayed for the newly selected page

title: Require authentication to view dashboard
description: A visitor who navigates to the dashboard is redirected to the login page.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the user is redirected to the login page

title: Logged-out user cannot access authenticated dashboard
description: After logging out, attempting to access an authenticated page redirects the user to the login page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Initiate logout from the main navigation
Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the user is redirected to the login page

title: Update profile name and email
description: An authenticated member can update their profile name and email and sees a success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /settings/profile
Fill a new display name into the name field
Fill a valid new email address into the email field
Submit the profile update form
Verify a profile update success confirmation is visible

title: Request a password reset and see confirmation
description: Verifies a visitor can submit an email for password reset and sees a confirmation status message.

steps.description: Navigate to /forgot-password
Fill reset.user@example.test into the email field
Submit the password reset request
Verify a password reset request confirmation status is visible

title: Change password successfully and log in with the new password
description: An authenticated member can change their password and then log in again using the new password.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill a new display name into the name field
Fill a unique email address into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Fill the same password into the password confirmation field
Submit the registration form
Navigate to /settings/password
Fill the current password field with the original password used during registration
Fill a new valid password into the new password field
Fill the same new password into the confirm password field
Submit the password change form
Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with the account email used during registration
Fill in the password field with the new password
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Delete account and lose access to dashboard afterward
description: An authenticated member can delete their account and is redirected out of authenticated pages and cannot access the dashboard afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill a new display name into the name field
Fill a unique email address into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Fill the same password into the password confirmation field
Submit the registration form
Navigate to /settings/profile
Click the delete account action
Confirm the delete action
Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the user is redirected to the login page

title: Filter the dashboard feed to My Posts
description: An authenticated member can enable the My Posts filter and see the feed update to the filtered list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the My Posts filter control
Verify the feed list updates to reflect the My Posts filter state

title: Switch to Dark theme
description: An authenticated member can switch to the dark appearance theme and the UI updates immediately.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open appearance settings
Select the Dark theme option
Verify the page theme updates to dark immediately

title: Switch to Light theme
description: An authenticated member can switch to the light appearance theme and the UI updates immediately.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open appearance settings
Select the Light theme option
Verify the page theme updates to light immediately

title: Navigate from login to forgot password
description: Verifies a user can reach the password reset request page from the login screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Click the forgot password link
Verify the user is on the forgot password request page

title: Switch between filtered and unfiltered feed views
description: An authenticated member can switch to My Posts and back to the full feed and the feed updates accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the My Posts filter control
Click the control to return to the full feed view
Verify the feed list reflects the full feed view after removing the filter

title: Theme selection persists after page reload
description: After changing the theme, the selected appearance remains applied after the page is reloaded.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open appearance settings
Select the Light theme option
Reload the page
Verify the theme is still applied as light

title: Switch to System theme
description: An authenticated member can switch to the system appearance setting and the UI updates immediately to follow system preference.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open appearance settings
Select the System theme option
Verify the page theme updates to follow system preference immediately

title: Theme selection persists when navigating away and back
description: After changing the theme, the selected appearance remains applied when the user navigates to another page and returns to appearance settings.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open appearance settings
Select the Dark theme option
Click the navigation link to open the dashboard
Click the navigation link to open appearance settings
Verify the theme is still applied as dark

title: Reject password change when confirmation mismatches
description: An authenticated member cannot change their password when confirmation mismatches and sees a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /settings/password
Fill the current password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill a new valid password into the new password field
Fill a different password into the confirm password field
Submit the password change form
Verify a password confirmation validation error is visible

title: Reject invalid login credentials
description: Verifies login fails with incorrect credentials and an error is shown while staying unauthenticated.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with invalid.user@example.test
Fill in the password field with wrong-password
Submit the login form
Verify an invalid credentials error is visible

title: Show validation when updating profile with invalid email
description: An authenticated member cannot save an invalid email in profile settings and sees a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /settings/profile
Fill an invalid email format into the email field
Submit the profile update form
Verify an email validation error is visible

title: Prevent registration with invalid inputs
description: Verifies registration blocks invalid email format or mismatched password confirmation and shows validation errors without leaving the registration page.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill New User Invalid into the name field
Fill invalid-email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Fill a different valid password into the confirm password field
Submit the registration form
Verify registration form validation errors are visible

title: Prevent submitting an empty post
description: An authenticated member cannot submit an empty post and sees an input validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Ensure the post body field is empty
Submit the new post
Verify a post body validation error is visible

title: Handle invalid email on password reset request
description: Verifies the forgot-password form shows validation or status feedback when the email input is invalid.

steps.description: Navigate to /forgot-password
Fill invalid-email into the email field
Submit the password reset request
Verify an email validation error or status message is visible

title: Cancel delete-account confirmation
description: An authenticated member can start account deletion and cancel, keeping the account and remaining in the authenticated area.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /settings/profile
Click the delete account action
Cancel the delete confirmation
Verify the user remains on an authenticated settings view and no deletion confirmation success is shown
